title: Military Uniforms
description: Military Uniform adds Armors and Weapons that is based on Military Uniforms all around the world - A military uniform is a standardized dress worn by members of the armed forces and paramilitaries of various nations. MABUHAY!!!
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85440a68e3504341f3b38ec376ed6e1e29fbfb9a.png)
Military Uniforms Mod Featuring uniforms styled after UK military attire, this mod lets players suit up with authentic-inspired designs perfect for roleplay, adventure, or battle scenarios. Each set is carefully crafted to capture the distinct style of the UK military. Whether you’re leading troops, building bases, or recreating history, this mod adds a new level of immersion to your world.



![Uniforms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe696f6098490f3f387794592e916450b84d58e2.png)
